name: HarvestIQ Pakistan — Post-Harvest Loss Advisor
description: Free post-harvest loss advisor for Pakistani smallholder farmers. Analyze harvest risk, calculate losses in PKR, and get actionable recommendations from CAAS China training and FAO research.
